examples.user_text:
Demonstration only. Reference-floor equipment list:
AHU_1-01
VAVRH_1-01
VAV-RH-HW_1-01
HW-PLANT_1
CHW-PLANT_1
COND-PLANT_1

The mechanical schedule explicitly lists VAVRH_1-01 and VAV-RH-HW_1-01 as served by AHU_1-01, and shows AHU_1-01 fed by chilled water from CHW-PLANT_1 and hot water from HW-PLANT_1, with the reheat coil on VAV-RH-HW_1-01 fed from HW-PLANT_1. COND-PLANT_1 has no documented connection to any listed unit, so it gets no edge. Return compact RelationshipExtractionResponse JSON only.

Demonstration only. Equipment list:
AHU_02C
VAV_2_01
VAV_2_02
VAVRH_2_1
FCU_02_3

The page shows AHU_02C's equipment graphic and a left-hand navigation menu that lists VAV_2_01, VAV_2_02, VAVRH_2_1, and FCU_02_3 for site navigation. No duct, airflow path, or schedule on the page shows AHU_02C supplying air to any of them; they only co-appear in the navigation menu. Because a navigation menu is not evidence of a serving relationship, the correct output is empty. Return compact RelationshipExtractionResponse JSON only.
